title: Deferred assertions have the same behavior as the immediate assertion if `--trace-fst` is used

features.name: assert final deferred assertion
features.description: Code should include an assert final statement that checks a signal value, where the assertion is deferred until end of time step per LRM 16.4

features.name: assert #0 zero-delay deferred assertion
features.description: Code should include an assert #0 statement that checks a signal value, where the assertion is deferred until end of current time step per LRM 16.4

features.name: immediate assertion for comparison
features.description: Code should include a standard immediate assert statement for comparison with deferred assertions
